title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your concern in writing, including specific details such as dates, times, and individuals involved. Next, submit your written concern to your immediate supervisor or the HR department within 10 business days of the incident. If your concern involves your supervisor, you may contact HR directly. HR will acknowledge receipt of your submission within 3 business days. An investigation will be conducted, and you can expect a resolution or update within 15 business days. If you are not satisfied with the outcome, you may appeal the decision by submitting a written request to HR within 5 business days of receiving the resolution. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
